_comment: One JSON file per company. Filename is the company slug used in apply scripts (e.g., zapier.json, ashbyhq.json). Each KEY is the exact question text from the application form (case + punctuation matter — apply-shared.mjs does fuzzy match but exact wins). Each VALUE is your tailored answer. Apply scripts look these up before opening the form so no required field is left blank.
_examples_of_question_keys_to_expect: Why do you want to work at <Company>?
Tell us about a project you're proud of
favorite API you've integrated with and why
What's the most interesting problem you've solved with LLMs?
Why do you want to work at Example Co: Two-paragraph answer specific to this company. Lead with the customer problem they solve, the technical primitive (forward-deployed AI / agents / data pipelines / etc.) you'd contribute to, and one concrete shipped artifact from your background that maps to it. Keep under 150 words unless the form asks for more.
favorite API you've integrated with and: Pick a real one you've integrated. Open with the API name + use case, follow with one specific reason it stood out (clean failure modes, debuggable webhooks, exposed primitives vs. opinionated SDK), close with the operational outcome (e.g., 'ops self-served debugging without engineer escalation').
